Label: Social Act
Definition: a planned act that creates, modifies, or extinguishes a social entity by means of communication between one or more agents.

Label: Speech Act
Definition: a social act that changes some social arrangement by means of speech.

Label: Document Act
Definition: a social act that changes some social arrangement by means of document.

Label: is responsible for
Definition: x is responsible for y iff....

Label: is causally responsible for
Definition: x is causally responsible for y iff x is an Agent, y is a Process, and z is a Process, and x is agent_in z, and z is the cause of y

Label: is normatively accountable for
Definition: x is normatively accountable for y iff x is an Agent, y is a Process, and z is a Process, and x is agent_in z, and z is the cause of y
Example of Usage: parent is a responsible for a child; parent is responsible or a child's actions; manager is responsible for the subordinate's actions

Label: has social group context
Axioms: domain: bfo:role, range: cco:'group of persons'

Label: is social group context of
Axioms: domain: cco:'group of persons', range: bfo:role

Label: Normative Accountability Role
Definition: a deontic role that is realized, when it is realized, in some act of...
Source to Consider: Adrien Barton? (Sherbrooke) Realizable entities, trigger conditions, role parts, etc. Taxonomy of disposition parthood https://hal.science/hal-02983145/ And https://ceur-ws.org/Vol-2285/ICBO_2018_paper_13.pdf

Label: Causal Accountability Role
Definition: a social role that is realized, when it is realized, in some act of...

Label: Obligor Role
Definition: a Deontic Role that inheres in an Agent and is realized, when it is realized, in some planned act ...

Label: Obligee Role
Definition: a Deontic Role that inheres in an Agent and is realized, when it is realized, in some planned act ...

Label: Act of Permitting
Definition: A deontic declaration that has specified output some Action Permission regulation and some Permission Role the realization of which stands in a permitted-by relation to the regulation.

Label: Act of Obligating
Definition: A deontic declaration that has specified output some Action Obligation regulation and some Obligation Role the realization of which stands in an obligated-by relation to the regulation.

Label: Act of Prohibiting
Definition: A deontic declaration that has specified output some Action Prohibition regulation and some Prohibition Role the realization of which stands in a prohibited-by relation to the regulation.

Label: Owner Entity Role
Definition: A role that inheres in a person and that, when it is realized, is realized in a social act and whose bearer exercises control over a possession, where this control is permitted by one or more deontic roles, which are parts of the owner role.
Source to Consider: Either use IAO_0020027 (d-acts) OR mint a new IRI (worst cast scenario). Original def: A role in a human social process that is based on a social act and whose bearer exercises exclusive control over a property, where this control is permitted by one or more deontic roles, which are parts of the owner role.

Label: Legal Attorney Role
Example of Usage: realized in maintaining confidentiality with respect to some subject matter; realized in negotiating with a potential client whether representation is apt

Label: Legal Party Proxy Role
Definition: deontic role that is ... acting on behalf of some person or group of persons
Example of Usage: realized in speaking to a court official on behalf of some party; realized in maintaining confidentiality with respect to some subject matter;
column10: Attorney vs lawyer vs other role (consider nuances in who can represent a client in court) -- preparations of a brief, for example, might require an advocate who is distinct

Label: Legal Advisor Role
Definition: deontic role that is realized in communicating legal advice to some person or group of persons
Example of Usage: realized in giving client legal advice

Label: A role that is realized managing the personal affairs of a person.
Immediate Parent: This person is acting as a custodian by making legal decisions on behalf of that person.

Label: Legal Guardian Role
Definition: A Role that inheres in an Agent by virtue of that Agent's responsibilities to care for or control some Person
